## Mapping Complete

**Focus:** concerns (Phase 25 trajectory + agent-work-contract audit)
**Documents written:**
- `.planning/phases/25-trajectory-agent-work-contract-redesign/25-AUDIT-2026-05-24.md` (345 lines)

**Key findings:**
- **DE-01 (HIGH):** Agent work contracts have 5 statuses defined but no state transition machine — any status can be set via upsert
- **DE-02/DE-03 (MEDIUM):** Both trajectory ledger and contract store have read-modify-write race conditions (no concurrent write protection)
- **FI-05 (HIGH):** Contract `allowedSurfaces` are not enforced by the delegation manager — agents can modify files outside their boundaries
- **MR-01 (MEDIUM):** Trajectory ledger lacks schema validation on read, quarantine for corrupt files, and deep-clone (unlike the contract store which has all three)
- **Test coverage:** Minimal — 135 total test lines across both systems, no edge case coverage

Ready for orchestrator summary.

- **DE-01 (HIGH):** Agent work contracts have 5 statuses defined but no state transition machine — any status can be set via upsert
- **DE-02/DE-03 (MEDIUM):** Both trajectory ledger and contract store have read-modify-write race conditions (no concurrent write protection)
